description: A screenshot of a social-media post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump' and a profile picture showing a face overlaid with a U.S. flag pattern. The black-on-white text describes conversations with the Prime Minister and a Field Marshal of Pakistan, references holding off force against Iran, the Strait of Hormuz, and announces a two-week ceasefire, signed 'President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump; @realDonaldTrump; Based on conversations with Prime Minister; CEASEFIRE
